children.name: repos.nix
children.desc: Personal declarative git repos -- test repo (HerauxValle/test) declared to exercise modules/packages/repos end-to-end.

children.name: repos.nix
children.desc: Commented example reference for config.vars.packages.repos -- declarative git repo registry with clone/remote/local-config reconciliation, companion to repos.nix.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Declarative git push-target registry schema (no defaults) -- existing local dirs -> named remotes, squash/history push. Logic lives in ./repos.nix + ./lib, driven by the reposctl CLI (pacnix github push/release).

children.name: sync-one.sh
children.desc: Per-repo reconciler -- clone if missing, remotes/local git config always enforced. Never touches commit history, working tree, or the currently checked-out branch.

children.name: sync.sh
children.desc: Repo sync orchestrator -- dispatches every declared repo to sync-one.sh.

children.name: repos.nix
children.desc: Git repo reconciler companion to venvs/venv.nix -- path resolution, ~ expansion, JSON handoff to lib/sync.sh.

children.name: config.nix
children.desc: Personal machine configuration values -- identity, boot, security, services, packages, and system settings.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Config directory imports -- personal values, self-hosted services, software, github publishing, and system settings.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: GitHub dotfiles-backup config imports -- exclusions, redactions (empty), and replacements for published snapshot.

children.name: exclusions.nix
children.desc: Paths excluded from dotfiles-backup snapshots -- secrets (secrets.fish, .envrc), build caches (__pycache__, target dirs), and machine-specific state.

children.name: redactions.nix
children.desc: Empty placeholder for optional values that could be blanked in published copies -- superseded by replacements.nix for all current use cases.

children.name: replacements.nix
children.desc: Maps sensitive local config values to placeholders for published snapshot -- username/hostname become maxmustermann/nixos, MAC nulled, email/serial replaced.

children.name: acl-traversal.nix
children.desc: ACL grants for self-hosted service system users to traverse specific mounted paths -- currently empty (qbittorrent moved to Storage mount).

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Catalog data imports for ComfyUI -- nodes, models, and node patches, grouped since they're all the same shape of inventory data.

children.name: models.nix
children.desc: Full catalog of every ComfyUI model ever pinned, keyed by name, auto-fetched on preStart, some split across multiple files.

children.name: nodes.nix
children.desc: Full catalog of 69 ComfyUI custom nodes ever pinned, keyed by repo, nix-prefetch-git via default-branch HEAD at generation time.

children.name: patches.nix
children.desc: Per-node source patches that redirect hardcoded read-only write locations to writable node_data/<repo> subdirs under dataDir.

children.name: comfyui.nix
children.desc: ComfyUI service config -- enabled/autoStart=false, coreRev/coreHash pinning, storage in SelfHosted vault, node/model lists separate.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: ComfyUI config imports -- catalog folder (nodes/models/patches) and service config, split to avoid burying config under hundreds of list entries.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Self-hosted services config imports -- one file per service plus ComfyUI subfolder, includes acl-traversal.

children.name: filebrowser.nix
children.desc: FileBrowser service config -- enabled/dataDir/autoStart=false, browses whole home, BoltDB in vault storage.

children.name: immich.nix
children.desc: Immich service config -- enabled/autoStart=false, existing 43GB data in Media vault (not Applications/Networking).

children.name: jellyfin.nix
children.desc: Jellyfin service config -- enabled/dataDir with cache/transcode/log, config/data/libraries symlinks, version/hash pinning.

children.name: odysseus.nix
children.desc: Odysseus service config -- enabled/autoStart=false, host/port from old main.sh and upstream defaults.

children.name: ollama.nix
children.desc: Ollama service config -- enabled/dataDir/autoStart=false, storage symlinks for model relocation.

children.name: openwebui.nix
children.desc: OpenWebUI service config -- enabled/venvDir/dataDir/autoStart=false, chat/user data in SelfHosted vault.

children.name: qbittorrent.nix
children.desc: QBittorrent service config -- enabled/autoStart=false, values pinned against real prior install from Media vault.

children.name: searxng.nix
children.desc: SearXNG service config -- enabled/autoStart=true, dataDir holds settings.yml symlink, venv/src reconciliation on preStart.

children.name: stash.nix
children.desc: Stash service config -- enabled/dataDir/autoStart=false, storage symlink to vault, version/hash pinning.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Software config imports -- programs (VSCode), services (polkit, systemd defaults), environment (scripts/shells/venvs), and packages submodules.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Personal PATH/environment config imports -- repos, scripts, shells, venvs.

children.name: repos.nix
children.desc: Personal git push-target registry -- test repo (HerauxValle/test) declared to exercise modules/packages/repos/gitctl end-to-end.

children.name: scripts.nix
children.desc: Scripts exposed as PATH commands -- qsr (reload), wallpaper, hyprfloat (window manager), run (launcher), secrets (vault dispatcher).

children.name: shells.nix
children.desc: Per-directory shells with context-sensitive $PATH -- Dotfiles/ gets tmux only when inside that directory via direnv.

children.name: venvs.nix
children.desc: Test Python venv (python311 with six and tabulate) -- exercises venv builder before real use, pinning vs floating, manual and direnv activation.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Software packages config imports -- personal selections and package source registry.

children.name: packages.nix
children.desc: Personal system packages by source -- pkgs/custom/kde/qt5/qt6/python, version pinning for swift, lists ~100 tools across dev/languages/build/shell/cli/media/security.

children.name: registry.nix
children.desc: Package sources registry -- kde/qt5/qt6/python from nixpkgs, custom sources from flakes (claude-code, claude-desktop, casket, ltree, crun, kitty with libxkbcommon wrapper).

children.name: dconf.nix
children.desc: dconf program config -- configuration engine enabled for XDG desktop portals and Wayland session daemons.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Programs config imports -- personal picks with no sensible generic default: gaming stack, silentSDDM's wallpaper, editor+LSP list, and VSCode.

children.name: fresh-editor.nix
children.desc: fresh (terminal editor) program config -- enabled with language-server extraPackages matching fresh's built-in lsp map.

children.name: gamemode.nix
children.desc: gamemode program config -- enabled, bumps CPU governor/priority while a game runs via `gamemoderun %command%`.

children.name: gamescope.nix
children.desc: gamescope program config -- enabled, micro-compositor for FSR upscaling / frame limiting / fullscreen fixes via `gamescope ... -- %command%`.

children.name: silent-sddm.nix
children.desc: silentSDDM program config -- enabled with login/lock wallpaper sourced from Scripts/Wallpaper.

children.name: steam.nix
children.desc: Steam program config -- enable, remote play + LAN game transfer firewall opened.

children.name: c_cpp.nix
children.desc: VS Code C/C++ extensions -- IntelliSense, debugging, code browsing, and CMake tooling (the cpptools-extension-pack's members, split across nixpkgs/custom.nix by what's actually packaged).

children.name: custom.nix
children.desc: VS Code custom marketplace extensions -- fetched directly by publisher/name/version, not packaged in nixpkgs.

children.name: docker.nix
children.desc: VS Code Docker extensions -- container create/manage/debug via Microsoft's actively-maintained Container Tools extension (not the deprecated vscode-docker or the competing docker.docker).

children.name: general.nix
children.desc: VS Code general/cross-language extensions -- todo tree, icon theme, direnv, editorconfig, prettier, gitlens, markdown linting, git history.

children.name: go.nix
children.desc: VS Code Go extensions -- rich Go language support via gopls.

children.name: html_css.nix
children.desc: VS Code HTML/CSS extensions -- HTML CSS support, auto-close and auto-rename tag.

children.name: json_yaml.nix
children.desc: VS Code JSON/YAML/TOML extensions -- rich JSON Schema validation, autocompletion, YAML support, and full TOML tooling.

children.name: nix.nix
children.desc: VS Code Nix extensions -- syntax highlighting and the nix-ide language client.

children.name: python.nix
children.desc: VS Code Python extensions -- debugpy, base Python support, Pylance, Python environment management, and Black formatting.

children.name: rust.nix
children.desc: VS Code Rust extensions -- rust-analyzer LSP.

children.name: shell.nix
children.desc: VS Code shell script extensions -- ShellCheck linting and shell script formatting.

children.name: appearance.nix
children.desc: VS Code appearance -- icon theme, window chrome, editor tabs, and workbench tree/activity-bar layout.

children.name: editor.nix
children.desc: VS Code editor behavior -- cursor, scrolling, formatting, guides, inlay hints, and diff view.

children.name: enable.nix
children.desc: VS Code enable -- fully declarative (mutableExtensionsDir = false), extensions/keybindings/settings managed entirely by Nix. Also clears stale userdata hot-exit backups every rebuild.

children.name: extensions.nix
children.desc: VS Code extension settings -- extension-manager auto-update plus per-extension config for todo-tree, Nix LSP, and nix-embedded-languages.

children.name: files.nix
children.desc: VS Code file handling -- autosave, trailing whitespace, final newline, and save dialog style.

children.name: misc.nix
children.desc: VS Code one-off settings that don't warrant their own file -- chat MCP gallery, quick-open search history, docker-run auto-config prompt.

children.name: shortcuts.nix
children.desc: VS Code keybindings -- custom keyboard shortcuts.

children.name: telemetry.nix
children.desc: VS Code telemetry -- disables feedback prompts, telemetry level, and edit-stats collection.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Services config imports -- polkit auth agent, systemd user manager defaults, and the Docker daemon.

children.name: docker.nix
children.desc: Docker daemon (virtualisation.docker) -- autoprune, live-restore across daemon restarts, and capped container log size. Compose/buildx CLI plugins themselves live in packages.nix, not here.

children.name: polkit.nix
children.desc: Polkit privilege escalation with GNOME auth agent (dark-themed) as systemd user service for graphical sudo prompts.

children.name: systemd-user-defaults.nix
children.desc: Systemd user manager defaults -- dark GTK theme + Hyprland desktop context propagated to all user services and portals.

children.name: autostart.nix
children.desc: Boot-time systemd jobs from old smg manifest -- 6 Casket vault unlocks with PIN, clean LUKS close on shutdown via execStop.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: System config imports -- autostart jobs, hidden devices, keyring setup, mountpoints, and port forwarding.

children.name: hidden-devices.nix
children.desc: UUIDs of the devices actually hidden from udisks2/Dolphin on this machine -- data only.

children.name: keyring.nix
children.desc: Enables a system secret-service keyring so apps like Claude Desktop can persist logins instead of re-prompting every restart; keyring password stays declaratively in sync with the account password.

children.name: mountpoints.nix
children.desc: External drive mounts (Backup, Storage, Media) under ~/Drives/ via UUID; Storage/Media blocking because services depend on them.

children.name: ports.nix
children.desc: Port forwarding config with mDNS resolution -- bare http://name.local reaches services without port via resolver on 80/443, ported from old pmg setup.

children.name: session.nix
children.desc: Session default applications -- editor (fresh), browser (vivaldi), terminal (kitty), file manager (dolphin), menu (wofi).

children.name: configuration.nix
children.desc: NixOS configuration root -- imports hardware-configuration, schema (variables), all modules, and per-machine config values.

children.name: disko-wiring-verification.md
children.desc: Records what was actually verified (schema, fileSystems generation, LUKS merge, a full VM install-and-boot rehearsal) before partitioning.nix could be trusted, and the one known divergence from the live system.

children.name: variables.nix
children.desc: Commented example reference for all custom config.vars.* options this repo defines, grouped by module -- copy/paste into config/config.nix to enable.

children.name: comfyui.nix
children.desc: Commented example reference for config.vars.services.selfHosted.comfyui -- copy/paste into config/self-hosted/comfyui/*.nix, companion to info.md.

children.name: filebrowser.nix
children.desc: Commented example reference for config.vars.services.selfHosted.filebrowser -- copy/paste into config/self-hosted/filebrowser.nix, companion to info.md.

children.name: immich.nix
children.desc: Commented example reference for config.vars.services.selfHosted.immich -- copy/paste into config/self-hosted/immich.nix, wraps nixpkgs services.immich, companion to info.md.

children.name: jellyfin.nix
children.desc: Commented example reference for config.vars.services.selfHosted.jellyfin -- copy/paste into config/self-hosted/jellyfin.nix, companion to info.md.

children.name: odysseus.nix
children.desc: Commented example reference for config.vars.services.selfHosted.odysseus (no dataDir, storage symlinked to srcDir) -- companion to info.md.

children.name: ollama.nix
children.desc: Commented example reference for config.vars.services.selfHosted.ollama -- copy/paste into config/self-hosted/ollama.nix, companion to info.md.

children.name: openwebui.nix
children.desc: Commented example reference for config.vars.services.selfHosted.openwebui -- copy/paste into config/self-hosted/openwebui.nix, companion to info.md.

children.name: qbittorrent.nix
children.desc: Commented example reference for config.vars.services.selfHosted.qbittorrent -- wraps nixpkgs services.qbittorrent, companion to info.md.

children.name: searxng.nix
children.desc: Commented example reference for config.vars.services.selfHosted.searxng -- copy/paste into config/self-hosted/searxng.nix, companion to info.md.

children.name: stash.nix
children.desc: Commented example reference for config.vars.services.selfHosted.stash -- copy/paste into config/self-hosted/stash.nix, companion to info.md.

children.name: packages.nix
children.desc: Commented example reference for config.vars.packages.environment (sources + packages) -- version pinning, flake inputs, pure/impure options, copy/paste into config/software/packages/*.nix.

children.name: repos.nix
children.desc: Commented example reference for config.vars.packages.repos -- declarative git push-target registry (existing local dirs -> remotes, squash/history push), companion to repos.nix + gitctl.

children.name: venvs.nix
children.desc: Commented example reference for config.vars.packages.venvs -- venv registry/builder with path resolution, activation, lockfile options, companion to venv.nix.

children.name: autostart.nix
children.desc: One real example config.vars.system.autostart.jobs entry for reference.

children.name: mountpoints.nix
children.desc: Mountpoints example config -- disk registry/manager (uuid-only required), LABEL/NAME resolution needs live disk access at activation time.

children.name: port-forwarding.nix
children.desc: Port-forwarding example config with all options grouped by concern -- net/tls/mode independent, combinable mechanisms (local+onion+router together).

children.name: hardware-configuration.nix
children.desc: Auto-generated hardware config with filesystems, LUKS, kernel modules, and boot settings for this machine.

children.name: apps.nix
children.desc: Symlinks home-manager XDG config directories to Dotfiles subdirs (Hyprland, Kitty, Mpv, Neovim, Scripts, Fastfetch, etc).

children.name: shells.nix
children.desc: Symlinks shell config files from Dotfiles (Fish, Nu, Pwsh, Bash).

children.name: theming.nix
children.desc: Symlinks theme/style files (Kvantum, Qt5ct, Qt6ct, Dolphin) and configures Qt6 appearance and fonts.

children.name: home.nix
children.desc: Home Manager configuration root -- sets identity from NixOS config and imports home/ subdirectories.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Backup module root -- imports dotfiles GitHub backup submodule.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Dotfiles GitHub backup schema -- opt-in master switch, skipOnTest to avoid pushing on test runs, remote URL and branch config.

children.name: _stub.sh
children.desc: Shellcheck stub declarations for activation fragments -- sourced only by linter, never at runtime, defines all dotfilesBackup* variables and functions.

children.name: preflight.sh
children.desc: Dotfiles backup preflight activation script -- runtime checks for excludeFiles/redactValues/replaceValues, calls Python stale-entry checker.

children.name: push.sh
children.desc: Dotfiles backup push activation script -- runs only if snapshot changed, detects network failures early to skip doomed recovery.

children.name: snapshot.sh
children.desc: Dotfiles backup snapshot activation script -- checks deploy key, auto-heals missing .git, creates/updates snapshot tag.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Dotfiles backup activation script logic -- splices Nix preamble into bash, ./activation/ static .sh files for linting, resolve.nix for value resolution.

children.name: resolve.nix
children.desc: Dotfiles backup value resolution logic (pure Nix) -- tolerant tryEval for redact/replace keys, filters failures to avoid stale-key crashes.

children.name: exclude.py
children.desc: Exclude files from dotfiles backup snapshot -- gitignore-pattern matching via fnmatch, replaces old rm -rf loop, imported by preflight_check.py.

children.name: lines.py
children.desc: JSON line field resolver for redact/replace/preflight scripts -- normalizes nullOr(int|listOf int) to None or set of 1-indexed line numbers.

children.name: preflight_check.py
children.desc: Activation-time staleness checker for dotfiles backup config -- warns about unused excludeFiles, missing redactValues, stale replaceValues entries.

children.name: redact.py
children.desc: Redact sensitive values in dotfiles snapshot -- replaces with asterisks, comments out line, per-line scoping via optional line field.

children.name: replace.py
children.desc: Replace sensitive values with placeholders in dotfiles snapshot -- exact literal substitution, published result is valid stand-in, per-line scoping.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Boot configuration -- GRUB theming, LUKS2 on VirtualKeys USB, and USB-required boot enforcement.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: GRUB boot configuration schema -- theme directory, resolution, hidden/graphical toggles, imports grub.nix implementation.

children.name: grub.nix
children.desc: GRUB implementation -- quiet boot suppresses kernel/systemd/udev console output, applies theme path and resolution.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: LUKS2 schema on VirtualKeys USB -- independent copy of USB label/keyfile path, matches hardware-configuration.nix device name.

children.name: luks2.nix
children.desc: LUKS2 unlock logic -- adds usb_storage/uas/ext4 to initrd, mounts VirtualKeys USB read-only before cryptsetup-pre.target.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: USB presence enforcement at boot -- poweroff if VirtualKeys not detected instead of falling through to passphrase prompt; opt-in.

children.name: usb-required.nix
children.desc: USB enforcement logic -- if enabled, poweroff at boot if VirtualKeys absent via require-usb-key systemd service.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Module directory root -- imports all schema submodules and defines vars.alias shortcut mechanism.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Desktop module root -- imports display server setup, graphics, theming, and default application configuration.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Desktop default applications schema -- terminal/fileManager/menu/browser/editor option definitions, imports sessionVariables.nix.

children.name: sessionVariables.nix
children.desc: Session variables from default apps -- EDITOR, VISUAL, BROWSER from config.vars.desktop.default.apps.

children.name: desktop.nix
children.desc: Desktop setup -- Dolphin menu (garcon xfce-applications.menu), udisks2, polkit, gvfs services.

children.name: graphics.nix
children.desc: NVIDIA graphics configuration -- open=false, modesetting=true, 32-bit support enabled.

children.name: theming.nix
children.desc: Theming setup -- QT_QPA_PLATFORMTHEME=qt6ct, Nerd Fonts Symbols Only for MyBar icon glyphs.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Imports and aggregates the core Hyprland compositor setup along with its accompanying plugins submodule.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Hyprland plugins schema with building docs -- raw specs (name/url/rev/hash), personal picks, build logic in ./plugins.nix.

children.name: plugins.nix
children.desc: Hyprland plugin builder (mkPlugin) -- builds from git against pinned pkgs.hyprland for ABI match, CMake/Meson configurable.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Nix configuration -- garbage collection, automatic store dedup with stats, and experimental features (flakes, nix-command).

children.name: gc.nix
children.desc: Automatic nix garbage collection -- removes orphaned store paths, preserves generation history/rollback.

children.name: optimise.nix
children.desc: Daily automatic nix-store hardlink dedup with before/after store size/path count/savings stats in journal.

children.name: settings.nix
children.desc: Core nix settings -- allow unfree packages, enable experimental features (flakes, nix-command).

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Packages module schema -- imports programs, repos, scripts, shells, venvs, and packages submodules.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Package declaration framework schema -- sources registry and per-package versions/default options, imports main.nix resolution logic.

children.name: README.txt
children.desc: Package versioning system documentation -- basic use, spec types (latest/flake-input/commit), pinning, hash discovery, aliases, configuration.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Package helper functions aggregator -- wires up resolve/validate/wrap utilities for main.nix package resolution.

children.name: resolve-default.nix
children.desc: Plain package resolver -- returns unsuffixed derivation for packages without version declarations.

children.name: resolve-spec.nix
children.desc: Single version spec resolver -- latest/flake-input/commit with optional hash pinning or bare '#' for hash discovery.

children.name: resolve-versions.nix
children.desc: Full version resolver -- suffixed/aliased wrappers per key, default/latest automatic names, manifest entries for hash discovery.

children.name: validate.nix
children.desc: Package version validator -- asserts default version exists in versions attrset, throws descriptive error if not.

children.name: wrap-aliased.nix
children.desc: Alias wrapper builder -- symlinks packageName binary to custom alias name on PATH.

children.name: wrap-suffixed.nix
children.desc: Suffix wrapper builder -- symlinks all bin/ files with version suffix to enable multiple versions on PATH.

children.name: main.nix
children.desc: Package resolution driver -- flattens sources + version specs into environment.systemPackages, supports multi-version coexistence via helpers in ./lib.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Program toggle schema -- generic defaults for fish/hyprland/direnv/nix-ld (repo assumes them), personal picks in config/programs.nix.

children.name: programs.nix
children.desc: Programs wiring -- assembles NixOS programs.* options from config.vars.packages.programs schema (fish, hyprland, steam, gamemode, silentSDDM).

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Declarative git push-target registry schema (no defaults) -- existing local dirs -> named remotes, squash/history push. Logic lives in ./repos.nix + ./lib, driven by the gitctl CLI (pacnix github push/release).

children.name: cli.sh
children.desc: gitctl dispatcher -- push/release subcommands for config.vars.packages.repos, invoked as `pacnix github <cmd>`.

children.name: common.sh
children.desc: Shared gitctl helpers -- entry lookup, existence checks, and the squash-snapshot builder used by both push and release.

children.name: log.sh
children.desc: [event] message output helper, shared by every gitctl subcommand -- ok/info/warn/error, colored when stdout is a terminal.

children.name: push.sh
children.desc: gitctl push -- pushes declared repo(s) per their configured remotes/modes: squash snapshot (isolated tmp repo, force-push) or history (real commits, rebase+push).

children.name: release.sh
children.desc: gitctl release -- squash-push + tag + a REAL GitHub Release for a named repo (githubRepo + a classic token are required, errors immediately if either is missing); release rm deletes both.

children.name: repos.nix
children.desc: Git push-target registry companion to venvs/venv.nix -- builds GITCTL_DATA json, packages the gitctl CLI (pacnix github push/release), deploys the required GitHub classic token.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Script PATH exposure schema -- generic default is pacnix (manages repo), personal picks merged from config/scripts.nix via Nix option merge.

children.name: scripts.nix
children.desc: Script wrapping logic -- copies folder to store, symlinks file on PATH, filters nulls from skipped entries.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Per-directory shell schema (empty default) -- path, packages on $PATH there, recursive flag; direnv generation in ./shells.nix.

children.name: shells.nix
children.desc: Direnv generation logic for per-directory shells -- reverses PATH order, generates colorized package lists, handles recursive inheritance.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Python venv schema (no defaults) -- logLevel, basePath, venvs registry; generation/manifest/direnv logic in ./venv.nix.

children.name: ARCHITECTURE.md
children.desc: Venv module architecture documentation -- directory layout, data flow, mutable state handling, direnv/venvctl mechanisms.

children.name: CAVEATS.md
children.desc: Venv module caveats -- shells.nix/venv.nix coupling and shim differences for direnv wiring.

children.name: DECISIONS.md
children.desc: Venv module design decisions -- path collision assertions, direnv source_env wiring, manifest path, shim protocol rationale.

children.name: README.md
children.desc: Venv module user guide -- quick config, rebuild flow, venvctl commands (list/update/activate), direnv integration, path collision rules.

children.name: activate.sh
children.desc: Venv activation protocol printer -- resolves by name/path, prints VIRTUAL_ENV/PATH_PREPEND for shim sourcing.

children.name: cli.sh
children.desc: Venvctl command dispatcher -- routes activate/deactivate/list/update to subscripts, sets LIBROOT/DATA environment.

children.name: deactivate.sh
children.desc: Venv deactivation protocol printer -- prints VIRTUAL_ENV= sentinel, optional current path for named unload banner.

children.name: list.sh
children.desc: Venv listing tool -- shows all declared venvs, path, python version, package count, activation status, build state.

children.name: lockfile.sh
children.desc: Pip freeze lockfile writer -- executes pip freeze atomically with .lock.new staging for safety.

children.name: build.sh
children.desc: Venv builder -- creates/updates venv, installs pinned packages, skips floating unless missing, writes manifest/lockfile.

children.name: log.sh
children.desc: Logging helper -- logLevel-aware print functions (debug/info/error), color-coded dot messages.

children.name: manifest.sh
children.desc: Manifest reader/writer -- JSON-based venv state tracking, entries for name/path/packages.

children.name: remove.sh
children.desc: Venv remover -- deletes venv directory, removes manifest entry, trusts manifest path over assumptions.

children.name: sync.sh
children.desc: Venv sync orchestrator -- builds all declared venvs first, then prunes stale manifest entries.

children.name: update.sh
children.desc: Floating package updater -- bumps 'latest'-pinned packages per venv or all, triggered via venvctl update.

children.name: activate.bash
children.desc: Bash environment wrapper script shadowing the main binary to apply session mutations via in-shell environment expansion.

children.name: activate.fish
children.desc: Fish shell command wrapper managing in-shell activation state transitions and path additions while passing through other requests.

children.name: activate.nu
children.desc: Nushell wrapper definition opting into environment mutation via def --env to intercept and update active environment variables.

children.name: activate.ps1
children.desc: PowerShell wrapper function for venvctl that captures environment updates to shadow the binary for active session manipulation.

children.name: activate.sh
children.desc: POSIX-compliant shell function shim using variable loop capture to modify environmental variables without subshell side-effects.

children.name: activate.zsh
children.desc: Zsh environment mutation function that mimics the bash implementation to intercept environment variable configuration calls.

children.name: how-to.md
children.desc: Shell integration guide -- instructions for sourcing venvctl shim in fish/bash/zsh/posix/nushell/powershell.

children.name: venv.nix
children.desc: Python venv builder companion to shells.nix -- path resolution, ~ expansion, eval-time python bin selection, manifest handling.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Security modules -- passwordless sudo via keyfile on USB, USB removal hard/soft/disabled power-off trigger, and personal GitHub auth/sign SSH key deployment.

children.name: github-keys.nix
children.desc: Deploys the personal GitHub auth/sign SSH keys (secrets github add auth/sign) from root-owned /etc/nixos-secrets into ~/.ssh with correct user ownership, retracting them the same way once removed. Wires ~/.ssh/config (auth) and global git signing config (sign) at fixed paths, regardless of whether a key currently exists at them.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Passwordless sudo via keyfile on VirtualKeys USB -- opt-in, checks SHA-256 hash on every sudo call via PAM rule.

children.name: check.sh
children.desc: Sudo keyfile checker -- no-mount read of the keyfile off the raw block device (ext/FAT/NTFS/btrfs direct, others via mount fallback), SHA-256 compare against the stored hash.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Sudo keyfile checker script -- no-mount read of the keyfile off the raw device (ext/FAT/NTFS/btrfs direct, others via mount fallback), SHA-256 compare.

children.name: check-stub.c
children.desc: Setuid-root stub -- execve()s bash directly with -p (bypasses binfmt_script's setuid-script stripping and bash's own ruid!=euid auto-drop) to run the checker script as root.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Setuid-root C stub -- execve()s bash directly (bypasses binfmt_script) with -p (keeps euid=0 despite ruid!=euid) running the real checker script.

children.name: register.nix
children.desc: Sudo keyfile activation script -- idempotent generate/adopt keyfile, hash+conf write, self-test read-back via the raw checker.

children.name: sudo-keyfile.nix
children.desc: Passwordless sudo via keyfile -- wires the setuid-root PAM checker (./lib/checker, ./lib/checker-stub) and activation-time registration (./lib/register.nix) into PAM, security.wrappers, and system.activationScripts.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: USB removal trigger for poweroff -- soft (clean shutdown), hard (force kill), or disabled; udev rule keyed to USB serial.

children.name: usb-killswitch.nix
children.desc: USB killswitch udev rule -- triggers poweroff when USB key removed, soft/hard/disabled modes.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Services module root -- imports self-hosted services framework.

children.name: comfyui.nix
children.desc: ComfyUI service wiring -- ties together FHS venv, nodes/models, core pinning, preStart reconciliation, update actions.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: ComfyUI schema -- enabled toggle auto-teardown, dataDir for venv/models/nodes, venvDir under ~/.impure/, logic in ./comfyui.nix and ./lib/.

children.name: info.md
children.desc: ComfyUI service reference documentation -- schema options, workflows, node source patches, model store/installed split.

children.name: fhs.nix
children.desc: ComfyUI CUDA FHS environment -- FHS sandbox with torch, CUDA libs, toolchain for native-extension nodes.

children.name: models-sync.nix
children.desc: ComfyUI model sync script -- fetches missing models, removes stale, validates file sizes to catch truncated downloads.

children.name: node-mounting.nix
children.desc: ComfyUI node mounting -- fetches/patches nodes, bind-mounts custom_nodes/<repo> with per-node patch support.

children.name: requirements.nix
children.desc: ComfyUI venv requirements builder -- hash-locked requirements.in from node+core pins, CUDA/torch header, preStart install script.

children.name: update.nix
children.desc: ComfyUI update actions -- core/nodes/deps checks with diff-only and :apply variants, git ls-remote + nix-prefetch-git.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Self-hosted services module imports -- one per service (ollama/stash/openwebui/comfyui/filebrowser/immich/jellyfin/odysseus/qbittorrent/searxng), plus lib.

children.name: adding-a-service.md
children.desc: Guide to porting new self-hosted services -- decision tree for binary/python/reconciliation, files needed, wiring checklist.

children.name: architecture.md
children.desc: Self-hosted services architecture documentation -- two-tree split (modules vs config), shared functions, systemd unit building patterns.

children.name: conventions.md
children.desc: Self-hosted services design conventions -- data/logic split, one generalization per real need, action vocabulary rules.

children.name: README.md
children.desc: Self-hosted services documentation index -- links to architecture, adding-a-service, conventions guides.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: FileBrowser schema -- enabled/dataDir/autoStart/host/port/version/hash/storage/requireMounts options, imports filebrowser.nix.

children.name: filebrowser.nix
children.desc: FileBrowser service wiring -- package build, systemd unit with BoltDB init, update check actions.

children.name: info.md
children.desc: FileBrowser service reference -- schema options table, systemd units (service + @update), BoltDB workflows.

children.name: package.nix
children.desc: FileBrowser release binary pinning -- fetches linux-amd64 tarball, extracts static binary.

children.name: update.nix
children.desc: FileBrowser update checker -- GitHub releases API, prints new version/hash, :apply variant edits config file.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Machine-level shared service concerns schema (ACL traversal only) -- flat array by design, system-wide fact not service-specific.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Immich schema wrapper -- wraps nixpkgs services.immich (postgres+redis+ml sidecar), enabled/autoStart only, no custom options.

children.name: immich.nix
children.desc: Immich service wrapper wiring -- mkFromNativeService binding, Postgres/Redis/ML config, shared update script.

children.name: info.md
children.desc: Immich wrapper reference -- wraps nixpkgs services.immich (postgres+redis+ml sidecar fully upstream), enabled/autoStart only.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Jellyfin schema -- enabled/dataDir/autoStart/port/version/hash/storage/requireMounts/fdLimit/ffmpeg/theme/plugins options, imports jellyfin.nix.

children.name: info.md
children.desc: Jellyfin service reference -- .NET binary with plugin/theme/network/rescan actions, postStart API orchestration, fdLimit support.

children.name: jellyfin.nix
children.desc: Jellyfin service wiring -- .NET binary package, theme/plugins/network sync postStart scripts, update actions.

children.name: network-sync.nix
children.desc: Jellyfin network config sync -- pushes port to InternalHttpPort/PublicHttpPort via REST API, needs admin key.

children.name: package.nix
children.desc: Jellyfin .NET binary packaging -- fetches release tarball, patches native libs (fontconfig/libstdc++), autoPatchelfHook.

children.name: plugins-sync.nix
children.desc: Jellyfin plugin installer -- postStart install via REST API, no automatic removal (safety limitation).

children.name: rescan.nix
children.desc: Jellyfin database rescan action -- manual maintenance for stale Folder/Movie entries, stops/edits DB/restarts/triggers scan.

children.name: theme-sync.nix
children.desc: Jellyfin theme CSS sync -- embeds theme.css into CustomCss via API, marker-delimited to preserve manual changes.

children.name: update.nix
children.desc: Jellyfin update checker -- repo.jellyfin.org latest-stable scrape, prints version/hash, :apply variant edits config.

children.name: wait-for-api.nix
children.desc: Jellyfin API readiness helper -- polls until API available, resolves admin key from env or sqlite, shared by sync scripts.

children.name: acl-traversal.nix
children.desc: ACL traversal grant wiring -- separate oneshot units per target, strict Before ordering, fixes PrivateUsers namespace issue.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: ACL traversal schema -- grants for dedicated-user services to traverse restricted ancestor paths, shared machine-level option.

children.name: mk-acl-traversal.nix
children.desc: ACL grant builder -- execute-only entries via systemd-tmpfiles or setfacl, idempotent or revocable, currently dormant.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Self-hosted service library imports -- plain function imports (service/, venv/, mk-from-native/), acl-traversal/ with real options.

children.name: README.md
children.desc: mk-from-native documentation -- wrapping nixpkgs-provided services/programs/packages, five categories (one implemented: services.nix).

children.name: services.nix
children.desc: mkFromNativeService builder -- wraps nixpkgs services.* modules, adds enabled gate + requireMounts checks, no unit rebuild.

children.name: update.nix
children.desc: mk-from-native update script builder -- shared by Immich/qBittorrent, GitHub releases API, diff-only/report approach.

children.name: mk-action-service.nix
children.desc: Manual-only service action builder -- systemd template unit per service (self-hosted-<name>@<action>), never pulled in by activation.

children.name: mk-self-hosted-service.nix
children.desc: Self-hosted service builder function -- enabled flag drives lifecycle (live or teardown), preStart/postStart reconciliation, storage mounts, dataDir handling.

children.name: mk-teardown-activation-script.nix
children.desc: Service teardown activation builder -- removes dataDir/storage/venvDir on enabled=false, scoped via teardownPaths option.

children.name: mk-deps-update-script.nix
children.desc: Venv dependencies update builder -- pip-compile diff vs requirementsLock, diff-only or :apply atomic move.

children.name: mk-fhs-venv.nix
children.desc: FHS venv builder -- buildFHSEnv wrapper, pure+reproducible (symlinks not copies), extraBwrapArgs for bind-mount overrides.

children.name: mk-venv-ensure-script.nix
children.desc: Idempotent venv preStart wrapper -- hash-checks requirementsLock marker, skips reinstall if unchanged.

children.name: mk-venv-install-script.nix
children.desc: Venv installation script builder -- FHS sandbox, pip install with hash locks, records marker hash for idempotency.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Odysseus service schema -- uvicorn git-cloned Python app, no dataDir (symlinks into srcDir instead), venv+git sources under ~/.impure/.

children.name: info.md
children.desc: Odysseus service reference -- uvicorn AI workspace app (chat, agents, research, docs, memory), git-cloned+pinned to coreRev, data symlinked into srcDir.

children.name: fhs.nix
children.desc: Odysseus FHS sandbox builder -- python314 (matching vault venv), lxml/libxml2/libxslt (for XML parsing), pillow/libjpeg (qrcode[pil]).

children.name: update.nix
children.desc: Odysseus update actions builder -- update/core/deps (and :apply variants), independent control of coreRev + requirements.lock.

children.name: odysseus.nix
children.desc: Odysseus service wiring -- venvEnsureScript, srcEnsureScript (git clone+checkout coreRev), dataLinkScript (storage to srcDir), FHS sandbox execStart.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Ollama service schema -- pinned release version/hash, models list (auto-reconciled postStart), OLLAMA_HOST host/port overrides, dataDir storage.

children.name: info.md
children.desc: Ollama service reference -- LLM inference engine, pinned binary fetchurl (no venv/FHS), models auto-reconciled postStart, sync+update actions.

children.name: package.nix
children.desc: Ollama binary package builder -- fetchurl GitHub release tarball (zstd), bundles libcublas/libcudart/libggml-cuda, addDriverRunpath for host libcuda.

children.name: sync.nix
children.desc: Ollama model reconciliation script -- postStart polling, pulls missing from OLLAMA_MODELS_DECLARED, removes undeclared installed models.

children.name: update.nix
children.desc: Ollama update script builder -- GitHub releases API, fetches/hashes new tarball, diff-only or sed-apply to config file.

children.name: ollama.nix
children.desc: Ollama service wiring -- package builder, syncScript postStart, OLLAMA_MODELS/OLLAMA_HOST environment construction, update actions.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: OpenWebUI service schema -- Python venv (FHS sandbox), dataDir, Ollama/local LLM frontend, storage symlink to SelfHosted vault.

children.name: info.md
children.desc: OpenWebUI service reference -- Python venv (FHS), pip-installed frontend for Ollama/local LLMs, WebSocket UI, @update rebuilds lock.

children.name: fhs.nix
children.desc: OpenWebUI FHS sandbox builder -- python312 (>=3.11,<3.13 requirement), pillow/libjpeg + lxml/libxml2/libxslt for image/HTML parsing.

children.name: update.nix
children.desc: OpenWebUI update script builder -- thin wrapper around mkDepsUpdateScript, pip-compile diff/apply only (no separate nodes/models/core).

children.name: openwebui.nix
children.desc: OpenWebUI service wiring -- FHS sandbox execStart, venvEnsureScript preStart, secretKeyFile generation, update actions, DATA_DIR environment.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: qBittorrent service schema -- wraps nixpkgs services.qbittorrent, torrent paths (Library/Incomplete/Database/Deprecated on Storage), webuiPort/torrentingPort.

children.name: info.md
children.desc: qBittorrent service reference -- nixpkgs services.qbittorrent wrapper, torrent manager, Library/Incomplete/Database/Deprecated on Storage drive, @update action.

children.name: qbittorrent.nix
children.desc: qBittorrent service wiring -- mkFromNativeService, serverConfig paths (save/temp/export/finished), WebUI settings capture/restore, requireMounts binding.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: SearXNG service schema -- git-cloned Python search engine, no pip package, srcDir checked out to coreRev, theme symlinks in dataDir, venv+settings.yml storage.

children.name: info.md
children.desc: SearXNG service reference -- git-cloned Python metasearch engine, venv (FHS), themes symlinked to Dotfiles/Themes/Searxng, settings.yml from vault.

children.name: fhs.nix
children.desc: SearXNG FHS sandbox builder -- python312 (>=3.10, <3.13), lxml/libxml2/libxslt for XML/HTML parsing, git for srcEnsureScript.

children.name: update.nix
children.desc: SearXNG update actions builder -- update/core/deps (and :apply variants), independent control of coreRev + requirements.lock (no nodes like ComfyUI).

children.name: searxng.nix
children.desc: SearXNG service wiring -- venvEnsureScript (pthExtraStep for no-pip-package), srcEnsureScript (git checkout coreRev), themeLinkScript (store symlinks with sed workaround).

children.name: self-hosted.nix
children.desc: Shared service builder function library (plain functions, not module) -- systemd units, Python FHS/pip lifecycle, mk-from-native wrappers, ACL traversal.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Stash service schema -- Go binary video library manager, dataDir holds config.yml/database/thumbnails/previews/cache/blobs, pinned version/hash from nixpkgs.

children.name: info.md
children.desc: Stash service reference -- Go binary video/media library manager with GraphQL API, cleanest service (just binary + dataDir), simplest setup + @update action.

children.name: package.nix
children.desc: Stash binary package builder -- fetchurl GitHub release (static Go binary, no dynamic deps), simpler than ollama (no autoPatchelf needed).

children.name: update.nix
children.desc: Stash update script builder -- GitHub releases API, fetches/hashes stash-linux binary, diff-only or sed-apply to config file.

children.name: stash.nix
children.desc: Stash service wiring -- package builder, execStart binary+host/port, preStart mkdir subdirs (plugins/scrapers/metadata/cache/generated/blobs), ffmpeg on PATH, update actions.

children.name: autostart.nix
children.desc: Turns config.vars.system.autostart.jobs into one independent root systemd unit per job.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Declares config.vars.system.autostart (global enable + per-job jobs schema), no logic.

children.name: architecture.md
children.desc: Explains why one root systemd unit per job replaces the old manifest/run.py/sudoers engine.

children.name: mk-autostart-dispatch.nix
children.desc: Builds the start/stop/restart shell scripts systemd runs for one autostart job.

children.name: mk-autostart-order.nix
children.desc: Asserts config.vars.system.autostart.jobs has no dependsOn cycles or unknown job references.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: System module schema -- imports autostart, storage mounts, networking, port forwarding, device hiding, and users submodules.

children.name: hidden-devices.nix
children.desc: Declares + wires config.vars.system.hiddenDevices (UUIDs to hide from udisks2), and warns if a reboot is needed.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Mountpoints module schema -- disk registry/manager (UUID+addresses), activation-time bash mount resolver, wiring in ./mountpoints.nix.

children.name: device-type.nix
children.desc: Mountpoint device submodule type -- UUID registry with optional mountpoint (at/as), enabled toggle, owner/blocking, resolves to path derived field.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Mountpoint entry wiring -- one shared bash function (mount-entry.sh) instead of mount-entry.nix's old per-entry inlined text; same decisions, same escaping, just called instead of spliced.

children.name: mount-entry.sh
children.desc: mountpointsWarn/mountpointsMountEntry bash functions -- per-entry leaf resolution, mkdir/mount/chown, blocking-vs-warn on failure; called once per device entry.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Mountpoint LABEL/NAME resolver bash function -- lsblk live queries (label/name/auto modes), shared by all mount-entry snippets, called per-entry.

children.name: resolve-leaf.sh
children.desc: mountpointsResolveLeaf bash function -- live lsblk LABEL/NAME lookup for a device, label/name/auto modes, shared by every mount-entry call.

children.name: mountpoints.nix
children.desc: Mount activation script (real bash, not fileSystems) -- live disk queries, LABEL/NAME resolution, blocking exit-code abort.

children.name: networking.nix
children.desc: Network config -- hostname, NetworkManager, pinned MAC address, timezone, en_US locale, French keyboard layout.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Port forwarding schema (declarative PMG reimplementation) -- LAN DNAT, IPv6 bridge, Tor onion, mDNS, SSH tunnel, UPnP, cert/router/IP-history.

children.name: architecture.md
children.desc: Port-forwarding architecture documentation -- entry schema (submodule not loose list), layer design (cert/mdns/ipv6-bridge/router/handler), test harness.

children.name: decisions.md
children.desc: Port-forwarding design decisions -- rationale for concrete choices made during development (not abstract advice), one decision per problem.

children.name: mapping.md
children.desc: Port-forwarding PMG migration mapping -- old pmg.py CLI imperative commands -> new declarative port-forwarding module, feature-by-feature correspondence.

children.name: README.md
children.desc: Port-forwarding docs index -- links to mapping (pmg->module migration), architecture, decisions, stubs (test-harness module specs).

children.name: stubs.md
children.desc: Port-forwarding Python fragments _stub.py guide -- type stubs for linter (concatenated .py fragments reference undefined names), test-harness module interface.

children.name: _stub.py
children.desc: Provides structural type signatures and namespace definitions for standalone python type checkers and editors.

children.name: ca.py
children.desc: Generates a self-signed root Certificate Authority (CA) private key and certificate if missing from the system state.

children.name: cli.py
children.desc: Implements the command-line interface entry points to ensure, display, regenerate, or serve the system certificates.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Port-forwarding cert fragment concatenator -- CA/leaf cert/key generation, systemd oneshot (port-forwarding-cert-ensure.service), auto-cert for null certFile/keyFile entries.

children.name: leaf.py
children.desc: Generates and validates the TLS leaf certificate and key populated with configured Subject Alternative Names (SAN).

children.name: preamble.nix
children.desc: Port-forwarding cert preamble -- first Python fragment with imports/constants, dnsNames (SAN list) computed from localName entries, iptables PATH.

children.name: serve.py
children.desc: Launches a temporary dual-stack HTTP server to host the root CA certificate for local network device installation.

children.name: dnat.nix
children.desc: Port-forwarding DNAT builder -- loopback entries (ipv4+loopbackOnly) get forwardPorts + route_localnet sysctl, external -> 127.0.0.1:port NAT.

children.name: entry-type.nix
children.desc: Defines the submodule options schema representing a single network port exposure configuration and its available exposure modes.

children.name: ip-history.py
children.desc: Monitors and logs historical changes to local IPv4 network interfaces and global public IPv6 addresses into a structured JSON file.

children.name: _stub.py
children.desc: Declares mock parameter schemas and method signatures for structural compilation validation across build boundaries.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Port-forwarding IPv6 bridge concatenator -- one systemd service per ipv6 entry, TLS/HTTP features, bindsTo entry.service (with autoCert fallback for null tls.*).

children.name: handler.py
children.desc: Negotiates optional TLS handshakes, performs path redirects, and coordinates low-level HTTP header transformations.

children.name: http-request.py
children.desc: Transforms inbound HTTP request fields, tracking client origin IPs and identifying long-lived connection protocols.

children.name: http-response.py
children.desc: Rewrites outbound HTTP response headers to adapt location targets, cookies, and security policies away from localhost rules.

children.name: preamble.nix
children.desc: IPv6 bridge preamble -- first Python fragment with imports/constants, per-port globals (PORT/MODE/TLS_CTX) Nix-interpolated, no CLI parsing.

children.name: relay.py
children.desc: Handles persistent full-duplex byte stream transfers between local client interfaces and background destination ports.

children.name: server.py
children.desc: Initializes a dedicated IPv6 socket listener that gracefully exits if the target backend already binds dual-stack interfaces.

children.name: tls.py
children.desc: Generates an operational server-side SSLContext sequence enforcing localized certificate pairs and HTTP/1.1 ALPN.

children.name: wait-backend.py
children.desc: Leverages Netlink multicast process connector events to blocks execution until target backend sockets enter an active listen state.

children.name: _stub.py
children.desc: Provides structural type signatures and signature declarations for external python linter validation tools.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Port-forwarding mDNS concatenator -- one systemd service per local=true entry, .local DNS advertising via UDP 5353 multicast, no elevated caps needed.

children.name: dns-codec.py
children.desc: Encodes and decodes binary mDNS question and answer packets, supporting cache-flush bits and direct unicast request flags.

children.name: preamble.nix
children.desc: mDNS preamble -- first Python fragment with imports/constants, per-entry name (Nix-interpolated), runtime IP auto-detect (DHCP-robust).

children.name: responder.py
children.desc: Listens for multicast DNS queries and transmits unicast or multicast A record name advertisements on local networks.

children.name: public-tunnel.nix
children.desc: Generates a supervised systemd service to manage an SSH reverse tunnel via a specified public provider with localized key validation.

children.name: _stub.py
children.desc: Provides structural type signatures and static dictionary interface schemas for runtime namespace declarations.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Port-forwarding router concatenator -- two systemd services (HTTP/HTTPS), resolveUrl routing, depends on cert-ensure, empty routes -> no services.

children.name: handler.py
children.desc: Parses incoming HTTP raw headers to extract host fields and performs either 301 redirects or socket connection relaying.

children.name: preamble.nix
children.desc: Router preamble -- first Python fragment with imports/ROUTES dict (local entries, Nix-computed), one script for both :80/:443 (argv flag selects mode).

children.name: server.py
children.desc: Initializes a high-concurrency TCP listener socket supporting TLS wrap context or plaintext byte-forwarding.

children.name: upnp.nix
children.desc: Port-forwarding UPnP builder -- runtime activation-time bash, detects local IP (UDP to 8.8.8.8), calls upnpc per entry, lease self-healing on every activation.

children.name: port-forwarding.nix
children.desc: Port forwarding wiring -- maps PMG features to NixOS constructs (firewall, DNAT, sysctl) and custom implementations (IPv6 bridge, mDNS, tunnel, UPnP, cert).

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: User account schema -- fallbackHash ('changeme') for missing password file, hashFile at /etc/nixos-secrets/, logic in ./users.nix.

children.name: users.nix
children.desc: User account wiring -- mutableUsers=false for declarative passwords, safety net prepends hashFile check to prevent account lock.

children.name: partitioning.nix
children.desc: Disko config -- exact current disk layout (ESP + LUKS2 btrfs-with-subvolumes root), pinned UUIDs, fully runnable for a real reinstall; NOT imported into nixosConfigurations, purely reference alongside hardware-configuration.nix.

children.name: variables.nix
children.desc: Schema-only file defining all custom config.vars options -- identity, boot, security, services, packages, system settings.
